violations.text: Unwrapped food observed in freezer on the cooking line. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
Water observed in stacked glasses. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen, server, and dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
A plastic piece on the cooking line slicer was not in good repair, broken off with rough edges. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025
The bin used to store portion cups was not in good repair, cracked in several places. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food chopper) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Tongs observed on unclean surfaces (beneath burners, and grill handle with one side in debris) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored at the 3 bay sink. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
The hand-washing sink at the bar AND dish-washing area was lacking proper hand-washing signage. PIC placed signs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicers and food chopper) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Chicken, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Chemical in spray bottle was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm) at the dishwashers located in the kitchen and bar. A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to wash and sanitize at 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Knives were stored on an unclean surface (inside prep units) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC removed and washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
Glass cooler located in the bar area was not in good repair (chipping paint/rust). New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (tomato slicer and microwave) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. PIC washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

A drain guard and food debris were observed in the hand-washing sink at the server's station. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed drain guard and debris during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service was called and serviced machine during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

And apron and a roll of date mark labels were observed in direct contact with ready-to-eat foods in a prep unit. Staff removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant ice water between uses. PIC brought utensils to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The dish machine was in poor repair, not dispensing sanitizer at the time of inspection. Service was called and serviced machine during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
